title: LifeSmart SUBLIME Panel Standard (Crest 2/Landscape Carbon Gray) SLSY2E18
description:
Lights and Shadows - The Premium Collection turns metal into a canvas of light and texture. With fine laser engraving, soft waves and flowing lines take shape, inviting you to look closer and touch. As light shifts, so do the shadows, giving each panel a quiet, living presence. Premium is ideal for interiors that celebrate artful detail, soft rhythm, and a touch of poetic charm.
Adapter: This SKU default does not include actuators. Need to be ordered together with extra actuators. | Notes: Cover Dimensions：150*86mm；
Panel Mounting Projection: 12.5 mm (13.5 mm for textured and deep-carved Pro/Max panels)
Mounting Method：The face cover is secured to the flange via snap-fit clips; the flange is fixed to an 80/86/120-type back box,Standard-1个-type back box，Pro-1/2个-type back box，Max-1/2/3个-type back box
Wired CoTP: CoTP 3-pin interface * 1、Expansion Module Slot:
Wireless CoSS: Supported by the device/Expansion Module Slot/CoTP
availability: Catalogue information under review / availability under review
